COMPLEX LITIGATION HEARING RE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AND PETITION FOR COORDINATION HELD MAR-13-2008 IN DEPT. 304. COUNSEL PRESENTS ORAL ARGUMENTS. THE COURT SUSTAINS THE DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT. COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE THE WRITTEN ORDER. THE PETITION FOR COORDINATION IS TENATIVELY DENIED BY THE COURT, AND CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING ON MAR-17-2008, AT 9:15 AM, IN DEPT. 304. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK FELICIA GREEN, COURT REPORTER IRENE BURNS, DEPT. 304.
